overall.description: A first-person traversal through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at dusk, featuring the iconic YAIBA building and dense neon-lit streets. The camera moves steadily through intersections and narrow urban canyons, passing vehicles and pedestrians in what appears to be gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077.

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing on the sidewalk near the building entrance

elevated walkway connecting buildings with glass railings
broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes on wet asphalt
tall green-tinted apartment complex with multiple balconies and air conditioning units

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a wide urban intersection dominated by the illuminated YAIBA building. The camera moves steadily across the yellow crosswalk, with wet pavement reflecting the neon lights. Sparse pedestrians stand on the distant sidewalk while the camera approaches the green residential towers ahead.

blue sports car passes by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: moving along the sidewalk then entering the street, weaving between parked and moving vehicles

blue sports car with glowing accents driving slowly in the left lane

entered.detail: tall red construction crane visible above the buildings in the distance
futuristic blue sports vehicle with illuminated trim passing by

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the green residential building, passing a pedestrian in a blue jacket at close range before entering the street. A blue sports car passes by on the left as the scene transitions into a narrower commercial corridor with dense neon signage. The construction crane remains visible ahead against the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban canyon with heavy traffic

events.description: passes a black sedan parked on the left side of the narrow street

agents.ego_description: moving swiftly down the narrow street, navigating between vehicles and maintaining a central path

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving alongside in the left lane, headlights illuminating the wet road

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a dense urban canyon with towering buildings on both sides covered in neon advertisements. The street narrows significantly as the camera passes a black sedan and continues toward the red-lit construction tower ahead. Industrial air conditioning units and glowing signage dominate the walls.

events.description: turns left toward the sidewalk, passing close to a pedestrian with a floral jacket
approaches the crosswalk at the intersection with the tall blue building ahead

agents.ego_description: slowing and turning left toward the sidewalk, navigating around pedestrians at the intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing a distinctive floral-patterned jacket walking past the camera
group of pedestrians waiting at the crosswalk near the street vendor

entered.detail: prominent cylindrical blue-glass high-rise building towering above the intersection
yellow-striped pedestrian crossings marking the intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a busy intersection, turning left toward the sidewalk and passing a pedestrian in a floral jacket at very close range. The tall blue glass building dominates the view ahead as the camera navigates the crosswalk area. Pedestrians gather near street vendors while neon signs illuminate the wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, neon-lit urban intersection into the claustrophobic depths of a dense commercial corridor. It begins by crossing a yellow crosswalk beneath the illuminated YAIBA building, moving across wet pavement toward a cluster of green residential towers. As the camera passes a pedestrian in a blue jacket and a speeding blue sports car, the environment shifts from an open plaza into a narrow urban canyon flanked by towering buildings and glowing advertisements. The scene then tightens further as the camera glides past a black sedan and industrial air conditioning units, heading toward a red-lit construction tower. Finally, the camera turns left at a busy intersection, passing a pedestrian in a floral jacket and navigating through street vendors toward a dominant blue glass skyscraper.
